subject: [PATCH v3 12/20] block: convert iomap ops to ->iomap_next()

2026-07-20.patch_summary: This patch converts the iomap operations for block devices to use a new callback function, ->iomap_next(), which is generated by the DEFINE_IOMAP_ITER_NEXT() macro. This change does not introduce any functional changes and is part of a larger series of patches. The new callback is used to finish previous mappings if necessary and produce the next one.
